title: centella debilis
intro: Centella debilis, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial activities. The health benefits of Centella debilis include improved cognitive function, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced wound healing. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
